subject: Love from Prague
body:
The driver...is ELIMINATING things in June.
For next few days I'm eliminating some traveling,but I made some commitments which I have to Honor, but June will be one big holiday.
:-)
Great way to celebrate my birthday.
So the driver is slowing down from 100...to 70 and in June 50...to 20.
It is maybe better then from 100 to 20.
Thank U dear flag man!
Would U like to still speak?
Sending biggest HUG!

Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra  

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Date: Mon, 12 May 2008 04:04:06 
To:petranemcova@mac.com
Subject: Re: Page Six


Though sick , you decided to take the baby out to multiple venues,- decide your top 20%, and eliminate the rest. ELIMINATE. - THE machine is grinding you into smaller parts -each part less able to maintain its purity.  At the last nascar race. I watched the man frantically wave the yellow caution flag at a driver who was going too fast to see the car wrecks just around the next turn. The driver nodded her head, and continued on at the same speed. AS the driver rounded the corner , she tried as hard as she could to apply the brakes, but it was  now too late------ I know how the flag man felt. --
----- Original Message ----
From: "petranemcova@mac.com" <petranemcova@mac.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, May 12, 2008 4:00:05 AM
Subject: Re: Page Six

I know. We R preparing a press release then it will clear up.
Any other suggestions?
I will call later. 
BIG HUG!
Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra  

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Date: Sat, 10 May 2008 20:37:03 
To:petranemcova@mac.com
Subject: Re: Page Six


1. it is unclear that you own aglow, it appears that you are all over the place- real estate -happy hearts -energy org and associated with zampoli and trump.  you were a treat thnaks

----- Original Message ----
From: "petranemcova@mac.com" <petranemcova@mac.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, May 10, 2008 8:46:15 PM
Subject: Fw: Page Six

Here it is.
Thank U for the invitation to Celinas special night! 
It made me so happy seeing her so happy!
And seeing U too!
Much love, purity and PUREX!
Ha ha

Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra  

-----Original Message-----
From: Janell Vantrease <vantrease@sunshinesachs.com>

Date: Tue, 06 May 2008 16:55:47 
To:Petra Nemcova <petranemcova@mac.com>, alexi.tavel@gmail.com
Cc:Shawn Sachs <sachs@sunshinesachs.com>,Ken Sunshine <sunshine@sunshinesachs.com>
Subject: Page Six


Hi Petra, attached is the item in Page Six today on Aglow Properties. 
  
Best,
Janell 
  
Janell Vantrease
Sunshine, Sachs & Associates
149 Fifth Avenue, 7th Floor
New York, NY 10010
212.691.2800
